TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bounnhang Vorachith ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, Bounnhang Vorachith, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1938) mrhuw Laos ta' misuw hya' ga Bounnhang Vorachith, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ő≤ounnńßaŇč *ora ¶~ ®ńßitńß rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ő≤ounnńßaŇč *ora ¶~ ®ńßitńß, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw laos~…ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ő≤ounnńßaŇč *ora ¶~ ®ńßitńß, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Bounnhang Vorachith ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, Bounnhang Vorachith, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1938) mrhuw Laos ta' misuw hya' ga Bounnhang Vorachith, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
